meta.title: DEF CON 30  - Crypto and Privacy interview with Silk
meta.description:
Silk gets the scoop on the 9 year old Crypto and Privacy Village

Check out Silk's work at YouTube.com/alexchaveriat and YouTube.com/hackerhangouts
